tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible prediabetes, despite a low fasting glucose level. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for possible early glucose metabolism disorder and consideration of repeat testing or further evaluation for hypoglycemia.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
